items.title: Eliminated Morocco turn attention to cohosting 2030 World Cup
items.summary: Morocco were eliminated from the 2026 World Cup by a 2-0 defeat by France in the quarterfinals, but host next edition.

items.title: Tko je jučer napao Iran?
items.summary: NAPADI su izvedeni jučer, upravo u vrijeme kada se Iran pripremao za pokop vrhovnog vođe ajatolaha Alija Hamneija, a mete su bile na više lokacija na jugu zemlje.

items.title: Superb Sinner ends Djokovic's latest bid for history
items.summary: Jannik Sinner produces a devastating display to end Novak Djokovic's latest bid for history and set up a Wimbledon final against Alexander Zverev.

items.title: Sinner demolishes Djokovic to set up Wimbledon final with Zverev
items.summary: Sinner is targeting his fifth Grand Slam title, which would bring him within two of the tally of rival Carlos Alcaraz.

items.title: ICE ubio Meksikanca. Ministarstvo: Tražili su drugu osobu, nije bio meta
items.summary: AMERIČKI imigracijski agenti u Houstonu greškom su ubili meksičkog državljanina Lorenza Salgada Arauja. Tvrdili su da je riječ o samoobrani, što je izazvalo prosvjede i diplomatski spor s Meksikom.

items.title: Indian cricket board to review T20 team’s ‘bad phase’ after England defeats
items.summary: India slumped to a nine-wicket defeat in the fourth T20 against England, following a 2-0 series whitewash in Ireland.

items.title: Iran na perfidan način potkopava Njemačku: ‘Koordinirani su, ‘dignuti‘ za minutu, a poruka je uvijek ista‘

items.title: UK police arrest man suspected of murdering former MP Ann Widdecombe
items.summary: Reform UK politician Widdecombe, 78, was found dead at her home on Thursday with serious injuries.

items.title: Peru’s President-elect Fujimori says she wants to restore ties with Mexico
items.summary: Keiko Fujimori has 'every intention' of ending months-long rift with Mexico over its political asylum decisions.

items.title: Watch: What links a bomb in Monaco and a shooting in Ukraine?
items.summary: A Ukrainian intelligence agent who confessed to killing the woman suspected of trying to assassinate a multimillionaire in Monaco, has now claimed he did not pull the trigger.

items.title: Hospital workers wounded in Israeli drone attack on Gaza’s Kamal Adwan
items.summary: Palestinian Health Ministry denounces attack as part of Israel's 'systematic targeting of health facilities'.

items.title: Ronaldo still has Portugal future if he wants it, says new coach Jesus
items.summary: The 2026 World Cup exit for Portugal was believed to be the end of Cristiano Ronaldo's international career.

items.title: FIFA has nearly 1,200 tickets still on sale for World Cup final at $7,380
items.summary: Several tickets remain for lower decks ranging from $19,995 to $32,970, as well as Trophy Lounge section at $34,500.

items.title: Bivši Trumpov suparnik (79): Ljudi stariji od 80 godina ne bi trebali voditi državu
items.summary: BIVŠI senator Mitt Romney (79) smatra da osobe starije od 80, poput Trumpa i Bidena, ne bi trebale voditi državu. Vlastitu dob navodi kao razlog zašto se povukao i poziva na novu generaciju vođa.

items.title: FOTO Tajanstvene metalne kugle isplivale na plažu u Australiji
items.summary: ŠEST metalnih kugli pronađeno je na plaži u Australiji.

items.title: Podignuta optužnica protiv donedavnog šefa beogradske policije
items.summary: VESELIN Milić, donedavni načelnik Policijske uprave za grad Beograd i bivši savjetnik predsjednika Aleksandra Vučića, uhićen je 15. svibnja i određen mu je pritvor u kojem je proveo 52 dana, a pušten je 6. srpnja.

items.title: Izraelski medij: Odnos Trumpa i Netanyahua postao je politička sapunica
items.summary: ANALIZA pada Trumpove popularnosti u Izraelu i napetosti s Netanyahuom. Propituje se može li Trumpov utjecaj spasiti Netanyahua na izborima usred šire krize odnosa SAD-a i Izraela.

items.title: Russian attacks kill five as Ukraine continues to target oil infrastructure
items.summary: Ukrainian officials say Russia's attack on Kramatorsk kills four, while a strike on Zaporizhzhia kills one.

items.summary: Britanska policija pokrenula je istragu ubojstva nakon smrti bivše konzervativne ministrice i glasnogovornice stranke Reform UK Ann Widdecombe. Polici

items.title: Ukrajina napala ruske rafinerije, terminale i brodove
items.summary: UKRAJINA je izvela niz napada na ruske rafinerije nafte, terminale i brodove, ciljajući energetsku infrastrukturu. Pogođene su lokacije u Krasnodaru, Taganrogu i Azovu, što uzrokuje krizu goriva.

items.title: Hundreds give hero’s welcome to Egypt after best World Cup run
items.summary: Supporters waved Egyptian and Palestinian flags in support of Gaza as the Pharaohs boarded an open-top bus for a parade.

items.title: Posljednja oklada Vladimira Putina: ‘Ima zastrašujući as u rukavu, ali ovo su tri stvari na koje treba pripaziti‘
items.summary: "Ruski predsjednik Vladimir Putin je kockar. Hladnokrvan i proračunat, svakako, ali svejedno kockar. Za stolom za kojim igra u Ukrajini možda su uplaćene posljednje oklade.
